name: Your Name
title: Cybersecurity Intern / SOC Analyst Fresher
summary: Motivated cybersecurity learner with hands-on practice in Linux, Nmap scanning, vulnerability identification, web security basics, and lab-based exploitation in legal environments. Strong interest in SOC, VAPT, and security operations.

bullets: Performed authorized vulnerability scanning on local lab machines using Nmap and documented open ports, services, and possible risks.
Practiced exploitation and post-exploitation basics on intentionally vulnerable VMs such as Metasploitable and VulnHub machines.
Created structured security reports with findings, impact, evidence, and remediation steps.

projects.name: Vulnerability Scanner Report Generator
bullets: Built a Python-based tool that runs safe reconnaissance checks and generates simple vulnerability reports.
Added support for target input, scan output saving, and beginner-friendly report formatting.

projects.name: VulnHub Lab Writeups
bullets: Published legal lab walkthrough notes covering enumeration, exploitation path, lessons learned, and remediation ideas.

certifications: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate - In Progress
TryHackMe / Hack The Box Beginner Labs - In Progress
